initial_result.prompt: Generate two monomers suitable for a thermoset shape-memory polymer with a target glass-transition temperature of 100 °C and a recovery stress of 28 MPa.

final_best_result.prompt: Generate two monomers suitable for a thermoset shape-memory polymer with a target glass-transition temperature of 100 °C and a recovery stress of 28 MPa.
final_best_result.revision_summary: To lower Tg with minimal change, one aromatic phenyl ring in monomer 1 was replaced by a cyclohexyl (aliphatic) group, increasing local flexibility and reducing backbone rigidity; monomer 2 was left unchanged to preserve the matched recovery stress.

all_candidates.prompt: Generate two monomers suitable for a thermoset shape-memory polymer with a target glass-transition temperature of 100 °C and a recovery stress of 28 MPa.

all_candidates.revision_summary: To lower Tg with minimal change, one aromatic phenyl ring in monomer 1 was replaced by a cyclohexyl (aliphatic) group, increasing local flexibility and reducing backbone rigidity; monomer 2 was left unchanged to preserve the matched recovery stress.
